prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains to an environmental permit application processed by the Environment Agency, which is responsible for environmental regulation in England. It specifically references regulations that apply to England and Wales, indicating that it is relevant to England.
